title: Diagnostic v0
description: BFF-shaped diagnostic record consumed by the Studio Problems panel and editor markers. Governed by ADR 0006 (Studio-BFF Contract Versioning). Owns the Diagnostic sub-shape that nested orchestrator artifacts (build-test-result, generation-response) reference via $ref. Positional fields and artifactRef are optional; Studio fallback rules for missing fields are enumerated in ADR 0006 Decision 4.

schemaVersion.description: DTO version per ADR 0006. Optional on the wire; absence means "v0". Bumped only on a non-additive change such as removal of a field or tightening of an enum.

severity.description: Canonical severity. Upstream synonyms (warn, information, fatal, note, ...) are mapped to this closed set by the BFF normalizer; unknown values fall through to "info" per ADR 0006 Decision 3.

code.description: Stable diagnostic identifier (e.g. "javac-syntax", "cobol-parse"). Empty string means the upstream did not supply a code; consumers render the message alone.

message.description: Human-readable description. Required. Entries without a message are dropped by the BFF normalizer because they have nothing to render.

line.description: 1-indexed source line. Absent → no in-editor marker; the diagnostic remains visible in the Problems panel with no source jump (ADR 0006 Decision 4).

column.description: 1-indexed source column. Absent → marker spans the whole line.

endLine.description: 1-indexed last line of the marker range. Absent → point marker at (line, column).

endColumn.description: 1-indexed last column of the marker range. Absent → point marker at (line, column).

filePath.description: Source file the diagnostic attaches to. Absent → diagnostic is run-level: it stays in the Problems panel only and is never rendered as an editor marker (ADR 0006 Decision 4).

sourceKind.description: Pipeline stage that produced the diagnostic. Routes markers to the correct editor pane and the matching Monaco marker owner namespace.

originStep.description: Orchestrator state name (e.g. "parse-cobol", "compile-test-java"). Renders an originated-step pill in the Problems panel.

artifactRef.description: Optional reference to the artifact this diagnostic attaches to (semantic-IR node, generated-Java file, etc.). Populated by Studio-IDE-5 (#244) and Studio-IDE-6 (#248); absent on diagnostics produced by older steps or replayed from v0 Evidence-Pack fixtures.
